hero.heading: Powering Dubai's Rooftops Since 1994
hero.description: Solaroofing is a division of Modest Company LLC — a pioneering family-owned UAE business founded in 1975, dedicated to engineering sustainable futures for heavy-duty industrial prowess.

story.heading: From Dubai's Gold Souk To The UAE's Rooftops

milestones.title: The Foundation
milestones.description: It began in 1975 when Modest Company launched in the heart of Dubai, providing structural excellence to a rapidly rising city. Our foundation was built on integrity and technical mastery.

milestones.title: Embracing the Future
milestones.description: By 1994, we recognized the shifting energy paradigm. Solaroofing was established to integrate industrial-grade solar solutions into the very rooftops we were building.

milestones.title: Scaling Impact
milestones.description: In 2010, we achieved a major milestone of 500+ commercial installations, solidifying our legacy as the UAE's trusted partner in the luminous monolith of renewable energy.

promise.heading: A Family Business Built On Three Generations Of Trust
promise.description: We believe engineering is personal. As a family-owned entity, every rooftop we panel is a testament to our family name. We don't just provide energy; we provide accountability. Our leadership remains on the ground, ensuring that technical specifications meet the rigorous demands of the Arabian climate. The promise is simple: transparency, durability, and a partnership that spans decades, not just a single project cycle.

timeline.heading: A Legacy Of Innovation Since 1975

items.event: Modest Co founded in Dubai Gold Souk

timeline.videoCaption: Our Journey: From Prefab Beginnings to a Growing Family of Businesses

hero.heading: Our Featured Projects
hero.description: Built on experience and attention to detail — ensuring smooth project delivery for 30+ years.

featured.name: Hormann Middle East — Complete Solar PV Installation, JAFZA
paragraphs: Solaroofing was commissioned by Hormann Middle East to design and execute a comprehensive solar energy strategy for their regional headquarters in the Jebel Ali Free Zone.

The project involved structural reinforcement of existing roofing assets followed by the installation of a high-yield photovoltaic array capable of offsetting the building's entire peak demand during daylight hours.
Through rigorous engineering and the use of Tier-1 sustainable materials, we delivered a turnkey solution that not only reduces carbon footprint but significantly lowers long-term operational costs.

hero.heading: Solar Calculator For The UAE
hero.description: Quickly discover how much you can save under DEWA's Shams Dubai Program — your expected cost savings, grid dependency reduction, and CO2 impact, all tailored to your property.

steps.title: Input Data
steps.description: We take your architectural roof dimensions and DEWA consumption profile to establish a baseline for your energy landscape.

steps.title: Shams Analysis
steps.description: Our engine calculates the potential energy production based on regional UAE irradiance and the DEWA net-metering framework.

steps.title: ROI Projection
steps.description: Receive a detailed breakdown of your payback timeline, equipment lifecycle, and long-term industrial profitability.
